fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reminder terms code that you want to set up foreign currency information for to be used when creating reminders.
The program copies this code from the Reminder Terms Code field in the Reminder Level table.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reminder level number for which you want to set up foreign currency information to be used when creating reminders.
The program copies this code from the No. field in the Reminder Level table.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the currency in which you want to set up additional fees for reminders.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the additional fee in foreign currency that will be added on the reminder.

fields.name: Add. Fee per Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the fee is distributed on individual reminder lines.
